popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description:
Granted the manor of Thurrock (afterwards Grays Thurrock) by Richard I circa 1195, and acquired Codnor by marriage a few years later.
HENRY de Grey of Grays Thurrock, Essex (-1219). m as her first hus …

zh.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor是Richard De Grey和Eleanor Declare的兒子，於1176年出生在英國英格蘭艾可瑟洛可。他於1201年之前與Isolda Bardolf在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1219年7月16日在英國德比夏爾可德諾享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可瑟洛可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor是Richard De Grey和Eleanor Declare的儿子，于1176年出生在英国英格兰艾可瑟洛可。他于1201年之前与Isolda Bardolf在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1219年7月16日在英国德比夏爾可德諾享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可瑟洛可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor was born in 1176, in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom as the son of Richard De Grey and Eleanor Declare. He married Isolda Bardolf before 1201, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 16 July 1219, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor est né en 1176, à Thurrock, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richard De Grey et Eleanor Declare. Il a épousé Isolda Bardolf avant 1201, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 16 juillet 1219, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Thurrock, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor wurde 1176 in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Richard De Grey und Eleanor Declare geboren. Er hat vor 1201 in England Isolda Bardolf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 16. Juli 1219 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Codnor, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Thurrock, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor è nato il nel 1176 nel Thurrock, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Richard De Grey e Eleanor Declare. Lui sposato Isolda Bardolf prima del 1201, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 16 luglio 1219, nel Codnor, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Thurrock, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey Lord of Codnorは1176年にイギリスイギリスエセックススウロックでRichard De GreyとEleanor Declareの息子として生まれた。1201年以前にイギリスでIsolda Bardolfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1219年7月16日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックススウロックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor(은)는 1176년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스록에서 Richard De Grey(와)과 Eleanor Declare의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1201년 이전 영국에서 Isolda Bardolf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1219년 7월 16일 영국 더비실르 코드너에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스록에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor nasceu em 1176, em Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Richard De Grey e Eleanor Declare. Ele casou-se com Isolda Bardolf antes 1201, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 16 de julho de 1219, em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor родился в 1176 г. в местности туррокк, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Richard De Grey и Eleanor Declare. Он женился на женщине по имени Isolda Bardolf перед 1201 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 16 июля 1219 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности туррокк, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor nació en 1176, en Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Richard De Grey y Eleanor Declare. Se casó con Isolda Bardolf antes de 1201, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 16 de julio de 1219, en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Thurrock, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
